case_title: NEHME, ALI et al VS OTELLINI, PATRICK FRANCIS

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,104.00 FILED BY OTELLINI, PATRICK FRANCIS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NEHME, ALI NEHME, NADIA NEHME, SUSAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $155.00 FILED BY NEHME, ALI NEHME, NADIA NEHME, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT OTELLINI, PATRICK FRANCIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEHME, ALI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OTELLINI, PATRICK FRANCIS $116.25 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $148.25, PLTF NADIA NEHME AND PLTF SUSAN NEHME ARE DISMISSED AS PLTF'S IN THIS CASE. DEFT IS 75% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT AND PLTF IS 25% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT OTELLINI, PATRICK FRANCIS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO ALI NEHME RETURNED SIGNED.
CERT MAIL SENT TO PATRICK OTELLINI RETURNED SIGNED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT OTELLINI, PATRICK FRANCIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT NEHME, ALI NEHME, NADIA NEHME, SUSAN CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
